default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Tribe AI and GrowthX's content collaboration progress and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [First batch of 10 articles completed; next 10 in progress](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [New QA process implemented for fact-checking and UX-friendly formatting](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Collaboration with Kendra on primer content and strategy alignment](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Content refreshes planned for existing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Weekly data-driven updates on ICP traffic from new content forthcoming](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [10 initial articles completed, awaiting review](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Next batch of 10 articles already in progress](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Minor workflow hiccup resolved, production now on track](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [New team member hired for QA, ensuring fact-checking and UX-friendly formatting](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Focus on balancing SEO requirements with user experience](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Coordinating with Kendra on primer pieces and downloadable content](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Aim to create synergy between Tribe AI's and GrowthX's content](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Planning to use Kendra's topics as guidance for internal content creation](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Goal: develop a holistic approach to content across both teams](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Content Refreshes and CMS Access

  - [Content refresh initiative starting this week](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Analysis of existing blog content via SEMrush and Ahrefs completed](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Identified early candidates for refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [CMS access (likely Webflow) needed - to be followed up separately](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

### Data-Driven Insights

  - [Weekly updates planned once articles are published](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Will track ICPs visiting the site (e.g., "100 people came to the site")](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Aim to calibrate content strategy based on attracting desired ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Focus on industries like construction, health and safety](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Plan to revive content written by Tribe AI's team](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Target: refresh content every 12-18 months](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Special focus on previously high-performing content that has declined](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send first batch of 10 articles for review tomorrow morning](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Tribe AI to review and provide feedback on initial articles](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up on obtaining CMS (Webflow) access](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Implement new QA process for fact-checking and UX-friendly formatting](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Begin content refresh initiative for existing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Align strategy with Kendra's primer content plans](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Set up weekly data-driven updates on ICP traffic from new content](https://fathom.video/share/kWgs2yNX5JxsswY12LeLvjRP4mTqNh1-?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

action_items.description: Review first batch of 10 articles once received from Andrej's team
Send first batch of 10 articles to Jaclyn for review by tomorrow morning
Follow up on CMS access (Webflow) for content publishing
